name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Multipoint connection allows pairing to two devices simultaneously. Premium sound quality with LDAC support for Hi-Res Audio.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Active Noise Cancellation and Transparency mode. Adaptive Audio dynamically blends ANC and Transparency. Up to 6 hours listening time, 30 hours total with case. MagSafe charging support.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: 200MP camera with AI-enhanced zoom up to 100x. Built-in S Pen for note-taking and sketching. 5000mAh battery with 45W fast charging. Titanium frame design.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Lifestyle sneaker with the largest Max Air unit yet. Engineered mesh upper for breathability. Foam midsole for lightweight cushioning. Great for casual everyday wear.

name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: The original straight fit jean since 1873. Button fly closure, 5-pocket styling. Made with 100% cotton denim. Classic and versatile for any occasion.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
description: Pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, and warmer in one device. 7 quart capacity for family meals. Saves up to 70% cooking time.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
description: Laser dust detection reveals microscopic dust. Real-time LCD screen displays particle counts. 60-minute run time on a single charge. Converts to handheld for versatile cleaning.

name: Kindle Paperwhite (11th Gen)
description: 6.8-inch display with adjustable warm light. Waterproof design (IPX8 rated). 10 weeks battery life on a single charge. 8GB or 32GB storage. Glare-free reading even in bright sunlight.

name: The North Face Thermoball Jacket
description: Synthetic insulation stays warm even when wet. Packable design compresses into its own pocket. Wind and water resistant outer shell. Ideal for hiking, travel, and everyday use in cold weather.

name: MacBook Air M3
description: Apple M3 chip with 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU. 18-hour battery life. 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display. Fanless design for silent operation. Available in 8GB or 16GB unified memory.

name: Fitbit Charge 6
description: Built-in GPS for pace and distance tracking. 24/7 heart rate monitoring and SpO2 sensor. Sleep tracking with sleep score. 7-day battery life. Compatible with Google Maps and YouTube Music.

name: IKEA MALM Bed Frame (Queen)
description: Clean-lined minimalist design. Solid wood and wood veneer construction. Adjustable bed sides to accommodate mattresses of varying depths. Easy to assemble. Available in multiple color options.

name: Nespresso Vertuo Pop
description: Brews 5 cup sizes from espresso to alto. Centrifusion technology for authentic crema. 27-second heat-up time. Compact design fits in any kitchen. Works with Nespresso Vertuo pods only.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: BOOST midsole delivers incredible energy return. Primeknit+ upper adapts to your foot shape. Torsion system supports natural foot movement. Ideal for running and high-performance training.

name: JBL Flip 6 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Powerful JBL Original Pro Sound with 2 JBL drivers and 2 JBL bass radiators. IP67 waterproof and dustproof. 12 hours of playtime. Compact and portable design for outdoor adventures.
